member.name: T:Verbex.BasicLemmatizer
member.summary: Basic lemmatizer implementation using simple suffix rules for common English word forms. This is a simplified lemmatizer suitable for basic text processing needs. Thread-safe for concurrent access.

member.name: M:Verbex.BasicLemmatizer.Lemmatize(System.String)
member.summary: Reduces a word to its base form using simple suffix rules and irregular word mappings.
member.param: The word to lemmatize. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: The lemmatized form of the word.
member.exception: Thrown when word is null.
Thrown when word is empty or whitespace.

member.name: T:Verbex.BasicStopWordRemover
member.summary: Basic stop word remover implementation using a predefined list of common English stop words. This implementation focuses on the most frequently used stop words that typically don't contribute meaningful content to search operations. Thread-safe for concurrent access.

member.name: M:Verbex.BasicStopWordRemover.IsStopWord(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether a word should be removed as a stop word.
member.param: The word to evaluate. Cannot be null or empty.
member.returns: True if the word is a stop word and should be removed; otherwise false.
member.exception: Thrown when word is null.
Thrown when word is empty or whitespace.

member.name: T:Verbex.CacheConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration settings for per-index caching.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.Enabled
member.summary: Master switch to enable or disable all caching. Default: false

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.EnableTermCache
member.summary: Enable term record caching for search operations. Default: true (when caching is enabled)

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of term records to cache. Default: 10000 Minimum: 1
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 1.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheEvictCount
member.summary: Number of term entries to evict when capacity is reached. Default: 1000 Minimum: 1
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 1.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: Time-to-live for term cache entries in seconds. Default: 300 (5 minutes) Minimum: 1
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 1.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.TermCacheSlidingExpiration
member.summary: Whether term cache TTL refreshes on access. Default: true

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.EnableDocumentCache
member.summary: Enable document metadata caching. Default: true (when caching is enabled)

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheCapacity
member.summary: Maximum number of document metadata entries to cache. Default: 5000 Minimum: 1
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 1.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheEvictCount
member.summary: Number of document entries to evict when capacity is reached. Default: 500 Minimum: 1
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 1.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: Time-to-live for document cache entries in seconds. Default: 600 (10 minutes) Minimum: 1
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 1.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.DocumentCacheSlidingExpiration
member.summary: Whether document cache TTL refreshes on access. Default: true

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.EnableStatisticsCache
member.summary: Enable index statistics caching. Default: true (when caching is enabled)

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.StatisticsCacheTtlSeconds
member.summary: Time-to-live for statistics cache in seconds. Default: 60 (1 minute) Minimum: 1
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 1.

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.EnableTermIdCache
member.summary: Enable term ID caching for optimized document ingestion. When enabled, term ID lookups are cached in memory to avoid database queries. This significantly improves ingestion performance for documents with overlapping terms. Default: true

member.name: P:Verbex.CacheConfiguration.TermIdCacheInitialCapacity
member.summary: Initial capacity for the term ID cache dictionary. This is the number of entries the dictionary will pre-allocate. Default: 10000 Minimum: 100
member.exception: Thrown when value is less than 100.

member.name: T:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase
member.summary: Abstract base class for database drivers providing storage backend abstraction.

remarks.para: This class defines the contract for all database implementations (SQLite, PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQL Server). Derived classes must implement connection management, query execution, and schema initialization.
All method interfaces are initialized by derived classes in their constructors. The base class provides common functionality for disposal and query execution patterns.
Thread safety: Implementations should use appropriate synchronization (e.g., SemaphoreSlim) for concurrent query execution.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Settings
member.summary: Gets the database settings used to configure this driver.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.IsOpen
member.summary: Gets whether the database connection is currently open.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Tenants
member.summary: Gets the tenant operations interface.
member.value: Interface for tenant CRUD operations. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Administrators
member.summary: Gets the administrator operations interface.
member.value: Interface for administrator CRUD operations. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Users
member.summary: Gets the user operations interface.
member.value: Interface for user CRUD operations within tenants. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Credentials
member.summary: Gets the credential operations interface.
member.value: Interface for credential CRUD operations. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Indexes
member.summary: Gets the index operations interface.
member.value: Interface for index CRUD operations within tenants. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Documents
member.summary: Gets the document operations interface.
member.value: Interface for document CRUD operations. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Terms
member.summary: Gets the term operations interface.
member.value: Interface for term vocabulary operations. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.DocumentTerms
member.summary: Gets the document-term operations interface.
member.value: Interface for document-term mapping operations. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Labels
member.summary: Gets the label operations interface.
member.value: Interface for label operations on documents and indexes. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Tags
member.summary: Gets the tag operations interface.
member.value: Interface for tag operations on documents and indexes. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Statistics
member.summary: Gets the statistics operations interface.
member.value: Interface for index and term statistics. Initialized by derived classes.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.#ctor(Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when settings is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initializes the database connection and creates the schema if needed.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when initialization fails.
member.remarks:
This method should:
Establish the database connection
Create all required tables if they don't exist
Create all required indexes
Apply any pending migrations
Initialize all method interface implementations

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.CreateIndexTablesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the index-specific prefixed tables (documents, terms, document_terms, labels, tags).
member.param: The table prefix to use for the index tables.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.remarks: This method should be called when creating a new index to set up its storage tables. The table prefix should be validated using TablePrefixValidator before calling this method.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.DropIndexTablesAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Drops the index-specific prefixed tables.
member.param: The table prefix of the index tables to drop.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.remarks: This method should be called when deleting an index to clean up its storage tables.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.ExecuteQueryAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a single SQL query and returns the results.
member.param: Whether to wrap the query in a transaction.
member.returns: A DataTable containing the query results, or an empty DataTable for non-SELECT queries.
member.exception: Thrown when query is null or empty.
Thrown when the connection is not open.
member.remarks: For INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE operations, the returned DataTable will be empty but not null. Implementations should use parameterized queries where possible to prevent SQL injection.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.ExecuteQueriesAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes multiple SQL queries in a batch.
member.param: Whether to wrap all queries in a single transaction.
member.returns: A DataTable containing the results of the last query.
member.exception: Thrown when queries is null.
Thrown when the connection is not open.
member.remarks: When isTransaction is true, all queries are committed together or rolled back on failure. This is more efficient than executing queries individually for bulk operations.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.CloseAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Closes the database connection gracefully.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.remarks:
This method should:
Complete any pending operations
Perform cleanup (e.g., WAL checkpoint for SQLite)
Close the connection

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flushes any pending changes to persistent storage.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.remarks: For file-based databases (SQLite), this may perform a WAL checkpoint. For server-based databases, this may be a no-op.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.BeginTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Begins a database transaction for batching multiple operations.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when a transaction is already active.
member.remarks: When a transaction is active, all subsequent queries executed via ExecuteQueryAsync will use the active transaction instead of creating individual transactions. Call CommitTransactionAsync or RollbackTransactionAsync to complete the transaction.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.CommitTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Commits the active transaction.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when no transaction is active.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.RollbackTransactionAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Rolls back the active transaction.
member.returns: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
member.exception: Thrown when no transaction is active.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.IsTransactionActive
member.summary: Gets whether a transaction is currently active.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.ThrowIfDisposed
member.summary: Throws an exception if the driver has been disposed.
member.exception: Thrown when the driver has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.ThrowIfNotOpen
member.summary: Throws an exception if the database connection is not open.
member.exception: Thrown when the connection is not open.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Dispose
member.summary: Releases all resources used by the database driver.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously releases all resources used by the database driver.
member.returns: A ValueTask representing the asynchronous dispose operation.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the database driver and optionally releases the managed resources.
member.param: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseDriverBase.DisposeAsyncCore
member.summary: Performs asynchronous cleanup of managed resources.
member.returns: A ValueTask representing the asynchronous operation.

member.name: T:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings
member.summary: Configuration settings for database connectivity.
member.remarks: Supports SQLite (file or in-memory), PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQL Server. For SQLite, use Filename and InMemory properties. For server-based databases, use Hostname, Port, DatabaseName, Username, and Password.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Type
member.summary: Gets or sets the database type.
member.value: The type of database to use. Default is .

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Filename
member.summary: Gets or sets the filename for SQLite database storage.
member.value: The path to the SQLite database file. Default is "./verbex.db". Ignored when is true or when using server-based databases.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.InMemory
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to use in-memory SQLite storage.
member.value: True to use in-memory storage; false to use file storage. Default is false. Only applicable when is .

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Hostname
member.summary: Gets or sets the database server hostname.
member.value: The hostname or IP address of the database server. Default is "localhost". Used for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQL Server connections.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Port
member.summary: Gets or sets the database server port.
member.value: The port number to connect to. A value of 0 uses the database-specific default port. Default ports: PostgreSQL=5432, MySQL=3306, SQL Server=1433.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.DatabaseName
member.summary: Gets or sets the database name.
member.value: The name of the database to connect to. Default is "verbex". Used for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQL Server connections.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Username
member.summary: Gets or sets the username for database authentication.
member.value: The username for database authentication. Empty string indicates no authentication. Used for PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQL Server connections.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Password
member.summary: Gets or sets the password for database authentication.
member.value: The password for database authentication. Empty string indicates no password. This value should be handled securely and not logged.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.RequireEncryption
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to require encrypted connections.
member.value: True to require SSL/TLS encryption; false to allow unencrypted connections. Default is false. Recommended true for production environments.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Schema
member.summary: Gets or sets the schema name for databases that support schemas.
member.value: The schema name. Empty string uses the default schema. Applicable to PostgreSQL (default: "public") and SQL Server (default: "dbo").

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.MinPoolSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum connection pool size.
member.value: The minimum number of connections to maintain in the pool. Default is 1. Must be greater than 0 and less than or equal to .

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.MaxPoolSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum connection pool size.
member.value: The maximum number of connections allowed in the pool. Default is 100. Must be greater than or equal to .

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.CommandTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the command execution timeout in seconds.
member.value: The timeout for individual SQL commands in seconds. Default is 30. A value of 0 indicates no timeout.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.ConnectionTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection timeout in seconds.
member.value: The timeout for establishing a connection in seconds. Default is 30. A value of 0 indicates no timeout.

member.name: P:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.AutoFlushInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the automatic flush interval for WAL checkpointing.

remarks.para: During sustained write operations (e.g., bulk document ingestion), SQLite's Write-Ahead Log (WAL) can grow significantly. A large WAL file degrades read performance because SQLite must scan the WAL for each read operation to check for newer page versions.

This setting controls how often an automatic WAL checkpoint (TRUNCATE mode) is performed during document ingestion. After the specified number of documents are added, a checkpoint is triggered to flush WAL data to the main database file and reset the WAL.

This setting is only used for file-based SQLite databases. It is ignored when:
is true (in-memory databases have no WAL file)
is not

member.value: The number of documents to add before triggering an automatic flush. Default is 100. Minimum is 1. Maximum is 10000. A lower value reduces WAL growth but increases I/O overhead. A higher value improves write throughput but may degrade read performance during bulk operations.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.GetDefaultPort
member.summary: Gets the default port number for the specified database type.
member.returns: The default port: SQLite=0 (not applicable), PostgreSQL=5432, MySQL=3306, SQL Server=1433.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.GetEffectivePort
member.summary: Gets the effective port number, using the default if not explicitly specified.
member.returns: The configured if greater than 0, otherwise the default port for the database type.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings.Validate
member.summary: Validates the settings and throws an exception if invalid.
member.exception: Thrown when the settings are invalid: - SQLite file mode requires a non-empty filename. - Server-based databases require a hostname. - MinPoolSize exceeds MaxPoolSize.

member.summary: Creates a deep copy of this settings instance.
member.returns: A new instance with the same values.

member.name: T:Verbex.Database.Interfaces.ITenantMethods
member.summary: Interface for tenant-related database operations.
member.remarks: Provides CRUD operations for tenants in the multi-tenant system. Tenants are the top-level organizational unit for data isolation.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Interfaces.ITenantMethods.CreateAsync(Verbex.Models.TenantMetadata,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new tenant.
member.returns: The created tenant with populated identifier and timestamps.
member.exception: Thrown when tenant is null.
Thrown when a tenant with the same name already exists.

member.summary: Gets a tenant by its unique identifier.
member.returns: The tenant, or null if not found.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Interfaces.ITenantMethods.ReadByNameAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a tenant by its name.
member.returns: The tenant, or null if not found.

member.summary: Gets all tenants with optional pagination.
member.param: Maximum number of tenants to return. Default is 100.
Number of tenants to skip. Default is 0.
If true, only return active tenants. Default is false.
member.returns: A list of tenants ordered by creation date descending.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Interfaces.ITenantMethods.ReadAllAsync(System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Streams tenants as an async enumerable.
member.param: If true, only return active tenants. Default is false.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Interfaces.ITenantMethods.UpdateAsync(Verbex.Models.TenantMetadata,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing tenant.
member.exception: Thrown when tenant is null.
Thrown when the tenant does not exist.

member.summary: Deletes a tenant by its identifier.
member.returns: True if the tenant was deleted, false if not found.
member.remarks: This operation cascades to delete all users, credentials, indexes, documents, and all associated data within the tenant.

member.name: T:Verbex.Database.Interfaces.IUserMethods

member.summary: Creates a new user within a tenant.

member.param: Maximum number of users to return. Default is 100.
Number of users to skip. Default is 0.
If true, only return active users. Default is false.
member.returns: A list of users ordered by creation date descending.

member.summary: Streams users within a tenant as an async enumerable.

member.summary: Deletes a user by tenant and identifier.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when settings is null.
Thrown when settings.Type is not Mysql.

member.summary: Builds the MySQL connection string based on settings.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Mysql.MysqlDatabaseDriver.CreateSchemaAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the database schema if it doesn't exist.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Mysql.MysqlDatabaseDriver.CreateIndexesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates indexes for the database tables. Each index is created individually with error handling for duplicate index errors (MySQL error 1061).
member.remarks: MySQL does not support CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS syntax. Duplicate key errors are caught and swallowed, allowing the method to continue.

member.summary: Initializes all method interface implementations.

member.summary: Executes a query without acquiring the semaphore (internal use only).

member.name: T:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries
member.summary: MySQL setup queries for creating and managing the database schema.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.SchemaVersion
member.summary: Schema version for migration tracking.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.CreateTables
member.summary: Creates all tables for the multi-tenant inverted index.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.CreateIndexes
member.summary: Creates indexes for common queries. Each query should be executed individually with error handling for duplicate index errors (MySQL error 1061).
member.remarks: MySQL does not support CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS syntax. Each index creation must be wrapped in try/catch to handle duplicate key errors.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.DropTables
member.summary: Drops all tables in reverse order of creation.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.MigrateFrom31To32
member.summary: Migration from schema version 3.1 to 3.2. Adds custom_metadata column to documents and indexes tables.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.MigrateFrom32To33
member.summary: Migration from schema version 3.2 to 3.3. Adds indexing_runtime_ms column to documents table.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.CreateIndexTables(System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL to create index-specific tables with the given table prefix.
member.param: The table prefix (typically the index identifier).
member.returns: SQL CREATE TABLE statements for index-specific tables.
member.exception: Thrown when the table prefix is invalid.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.DropIndexTables(System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL to drop index-specific tables with the given table prefix.
member.param: The table prefix (typically the index identifier).
member.returns: SQL DROP TABLE statements for index-specific tables.
member.exception: Thrown when the table prefix is invalid.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Mysql.Queries.SetupQueries.CreateIndexTableIndexes(System.String)
member.summary: Generates SQL statements to create indexes for index-specific tables. Each statement should be executed individually with error handling for duplicate index errors.
member.param: The table prefix (typically the index identifier).
member.returns: List of SQL CREATE INDEX statements.
member.exception: Thrown when the table prefix is invalid.

member.name: T:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver
member.summary: SQLite implementation of the database driver.

remarks.para: Supports both in-memory and file-based SQLite databases. Uses WAL mode for improved concurrent access performance.

Thread safety: Uses ReaderWriterLockSlim to allow concurrent read operations while serializing write operations. Read queries (SELECT) use ephemeral connections and can execute in parallel. Write queries and transactions use a dedicated write connection with exclusive access.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.#ctor(Verbex.Database.DatabaseSettings)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.exception: Thrown when settings is null.
Thrown when settings.Type is not Sqlite.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.LoadDataTableWithoutConstraintsAsync(Microsoft.Data.Sqlite.SqliteDataReader,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Loads data from a reader into a DataTable without constraint checking.
member.param: The data reader to read from.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.ExecuteReadQueryAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a read-only query using a read lock and ephemeral connection.
member.returns: A DataTable containing the query results.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.ExecuteWriteQueryAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a write query using a write lock and the dedicated write connection.
member.param: Whether to wrap the query in a transaction.
member.returns: A DataTable containing the query results.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.CheckpointAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a WAL checkpoint to move data from WAL to main database.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.CheckpointInternalAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Performs a WAL checkpoint without acquiring the lock.
member.remarks: Caller must hold the write lock.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.SaveToFileAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves an in-memory database to a file.
member.exception: Thrown when not in in-memory mode.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.GetWriteConnection
member.summary: Gets the internal SQLite write connection for advanced operations.
member.exception: Thrown when connection is not open.
member.remarks: Caller must acquire appropriate lock before using this connection. For read operations, prefer using ExecuteQueryAsync which handles locking automatically.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.GetLock
member.summary: Gets the reader-writer lock for thread-safe operations.
member.remarks: Use EnterReadLock for read operations and EnterWriteLock for write operations.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.BuildConnectionString
member.summary: Builds the SQLite connection string based on settings.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.ApplyPragmasAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Applies SQLite pragmas for optimal performance.
member.remarks: Caller must hold the write lock.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.Sqlite.SqliteDatabaseDriver.CreateSchemaAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates the database schema if it doesn't exist.
member.remarks: Caller must hold the write lock.

member.summary: Initializes all method interface implementations.

member.summary: Determines if a query is read-only (SELECT statement).
member.returns: True if the query is a SELECT statement; otherwise false.

member.name: T:Verbex.Database.TablePrefixValidator
member.summary: Validates and sanitizes table prefixes for index-specific tables.
member.remarks: Table prefixes are used to isolate index data in a shared database. Each index gets its own set of tables with names like {prefix}_documents.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.TablePrefixValidator.MaxPrefixLength
member.summary: Maximum length for a table prefix to ensure total table name stays within database limits. MySQL has a 64-character identifier limit. With suffix "_document_terms" (15 chars), we allow 48 characters for the prefix.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.TablePrefixValidator.MinPrefixLength
member.summary: Minimum length for a table prefix to ensure meaningful identifiers.

member.name: F:Verbex.Database.TablePrefixValidator._ValidPrefixPattern
member.summary: Pattern for valid table prefixes: alphanumeric and underscore only, must start with letter or underscore.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.TablePrefixValidator.Validate(System.String)
member.summary: Validates and returns the table prefix if valid.
member.exception: Thrown when the prefix is invalid.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.TablePrefixValidator.IsValid(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if a table prefix is valid without throwing exceptions.
member.returns: True if the prefix is valid, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Verbex.Database.TablePrefixValidator.FromIndexId(System.String)
member.summary: Creates a safe table prefix from an index identifier. Replaces invalid characters with underscores.
member.returns: A safe table prefix derived from the index ID.
member.exception: Thrown when the resulting prefix is empty or too long.

member.name: T:Verbex.DefaultTokenizer
member.summary: Default implementation of ITokenizer that provides basic word tokenization Splits text on whitespace and common punctuation marks

member.name: F:Verbex.DefaultTokenizer.DefaultSeparators
member.summary: Characters used to split text into tokens

member.name: M:Verbex.DefaultTokenizer.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DefaultTokenizer class with default separators

member.name: M:Verbex.DefaultTokenizer.#ctor(System.Char[])
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DefaultTokenizer class with custom separators
member.param: Custom separator characters to use for tokenization
member.exception: Thrown when separators is null

member.name: M:Verbex.DefaultTokenizer.Tokenize(System.String)
member.summary: Tokenizes the given content into an array of tokens Converts content to lowercase and splits on configured separator characters
member.returns: Array of lowercase tokens extracted from the content
member.exception: Thrown when content is null

member.name: T:Verbex.DocumentMetadata
member.summary: Metadata for a document stored in the inverted index

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DocumentMetadata class with minimal parameters. Used primarily by the repository layer.
member.param: The path or location of the document
member.exception: Thrown when documentId is empty
Thrown when documentPath is null

member.name: M:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.Int64,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the DocumentMetadata class
member.param: The path or location of the document
The length of the document in characters
SHA-256 hash of the document content for duplicate detection
The original file name (optional, used for retrieval by name)
member.exception: Thrown when documentId is empty
Thrown when documentPath or contentSha256 is null
Thrown when documentLength is negative

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.DocumentId
member.summary: Gets the unique document identifier

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.DocumentPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the path or location of the document
member.exception: Thrown when value is null

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.OriginalFileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the original file name of the document. This is used for retrieval by file name and is separate from the GUID-based storage path. Can be null if no original file name was provided.

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.DocumentLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the document in characters Minimum value: 0
member.exception: Thrown when value is negative

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.IndexedDate
member.summary: Gets or sets the date when the document was first indexed

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.LastModified
member.summary: Gets or sets the date when the document metadata was last modified

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.IndexingRuntimeMs
member.summary: Gets or sets the indexing runtime in milliseconds. Time taken to process and index the document content. Null if not yet indexed or timing was not captured.

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.ContentSha256
member.summary: Gets or sets the SHA-256 hash of the document content for duplicate detection
member.exception: Thrown when value is null

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.Terms
member.summary: Gets a read-only collection of terms contained in this document

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.IsDeleted
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this document has been marked for deletion Default value: false When true, the document will be excluded from search results and eligible for garbage collection

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Gets or sets custom metadata for the document. Can be any JSON-serializable value (object, array, string, number, boolean, null).

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.Tags
member.summary: Gets a read-only dictionary of tags (key-value pairs) associated with this document.

member.name: P:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.Labels
member.summary: Gets a read-only list of labels associated with this document. Labels are case-insensitive strings used for categorization.

member.name: M:Verbex.DocumentMetadata.AddTerm(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a term to the document's term collection
member.returns: True if the term was added, false if it already existed
member.exception: Thrown when term is null

member.summary: Searches the index for documents matching the query with optional label and tag filtering. Use "*" as the query to return all documents (optionally filtered by labels/tags) without term matching.
member.param: Search query string. Use "*" for wildcard (all documents).
If true, documents must contain all terms. If false, any term.
Optional list of labels to filter by (documents must have ALL labels).
Optional dictionary of tags to filter by (documents must have ALL tags).

member.summary: Performs a wildcard search returning all documents, optionally filtered by labels/tags. All results have a score of 0 and are ordered by creation date.
member.returns: Search results with score 0 for all documents.

member.name: T:Verbex.MetadataFilter
member.summary: Represents a filter for searching documents by their custom metadata properties and labels. Multiple filters are combined with AND logic (all filters must match). Label matching is case-insensitive. Tag (custom metadata) matching is exact.

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MetadataFilter class with no filters.

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.#ctor(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MetadataFilter class with a single key-value filter.
member.param: The metadata key to filter on
member.exception: Thrown when key is null
Thrown when key is empty or whitespace

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MetadataFilter class with multiple filters.
member.param: Dictionary of metadata key-value pairs to filter on
member.exception: Thrown when filters is null

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MetadataFilter class with labels only.
member.param: Collection of labels to filter on (case-insensitive)
member.exception: Thrown when labels is null

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the MetadataFilter class with both tags and labels.
member.param: Dictionary of metadata key-value pairs to filter on
Collection of labels to filter on (case-insensitive)
member.exception: Thrown when filters or labels is null

member.name: P:Verbex.MetadataFilter.Count
member.summary: Gets the count of tag filters in this MetadataFilter.

member.name: P:Verbex.MetadataFilter.LabelCount
member.summary: Gets the count of label filters in this MetadataFilter.

member.name: P:Verbex.MetadataFilter.TotalCount
member.summary: Gets the total count of all filters (tags + labels) in this MetadataFilter.

member.name: P:Verbex.MetadataFilter.IsEmpty
member.summary: Gets whether this MetadataFilter has no filters (will match all documents). Returns true only if both tag filters and label filters are empty.

member.name: P:Verbex.MetadataFilter.Filters
member.summary: Gets a read-only dictionary of the tag filter key-value pairs.

member.name: P:Verbex.MetadataFilter.Labels
member.summary: Gets a read-only collection of the label filters. Label matching is case-insensitive.

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.Add(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Adds a filter for the specified key and value. If a filter for the key already exists, it will be replaced.
member.param: The metadata key to filter on
member.returns: This MetadataFilter instance for method chaining
member.exception: Thrown when key is null
Thrown when key is empty or whitespace

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes the filter for the specified key.
member.returns: True if the filter was removed, false if the key was not found
member.exception: Thrown when key is null

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.Clear
member.summary: Clears all tag filters from this MetadataFilter. Does not affect label filters.

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.ClearAll
member.summary: Clears all filters (both tags and labels) from this MetadataFilter.

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.AddLabel(System.String)
member.summary: Adds a label to the filter. Label matching is case-insensitive.
member.returns: This MetadataFilter instance for method chaining
member.exception: Thrown when label is null
Thrown when label is empty or whitespace

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.AddLabels(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Adds multiple labels to the filter. Label matching is case-insensitive. Empty or whitespace labels are ignored.
member.returns: This MetadataFilter instance for method chaining
member.exception: Thrown when labels is null

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.RemoveLabel(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a label from the filter.
member.returns: True if the label was removed, false if not found
member.exception: Thrown when label is null

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.ClearLabels
member.summary: Clears all label filters from this MetadataFilter. Does not affect tag filters.

member.name: M:Verbex.MetadataFilter.HasLabel(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether this filter contains the specified label. Comparison is case-insensitive.
member.returns: True if the filter contains the label, false otherwise

member.summary: Checks whether the specified document metadata matches all filters. All filter conditions must be satisfied (AND logic). Both tag filters and label filters must match.

member.exception: Thrown when metadata is null

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.Administrator
member.summary: Represents a global administrator with system-wide privileges.
member.remarks: Administrators have access to all tenants and can perform system-wide operations such as creating tenants, managing global settings, and accessing any tenant's data. Passwords are stored as SHA-256 hashes.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.Identifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the administrator.
member.value: A k-sortable unique identifier with "adm_" prefix. Example: "adm_01ar5xxlajk1sxr6hzf29ksz4o01234567890abc".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the administrator's email address.
member.value: The email address. Must be globally unique across all administrators.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.PasswordSha256
member.summary: Gets or sets the SHA-256 hash of the administrator's password.
member.value: A 64-character hexadecimal string representing the SHA-256 hash. Use to set from plain text.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.FirstName
member.summary: Gets or sets the administrator's first name.
member.value: The first name. Optional.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.LastName
member.summary: Gets or sets the administrator's last name.
member.value: The last name. Optional.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.Active
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the administrator account is active.
member.value: True if the administrator account is active and can authenticate; false if disabled. Default is true.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the administrator was created.
member.value: The creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Administrator.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the administrator was last updated.
member.value: The last update timestamp in UTC.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Administrator.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: The identifier is automatically generated using a k-sortable ID with "adm_" prefix. Timestamps are set to the current UTC time.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Administrator.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with an email.
member.exception: Thrown when email is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Administrator.SetPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Sets the administrator's password by computing and storing its SHA-256 hash.
member.param: The plain text password to hash.
member.exception: Thrown when password is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Administrator.VerifyPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a plain text password against the stored hash.
member.param: The plain text password to verify.
member.returns: True if the password matches; false otherwise.

member.summary: Computes the SHA-256 hash of a password.
member.returns: A 64-character hexadecimal string representing the SHA-256 hash.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext
member.summary: Represents the context of an authentication attempt and its result.

remarks.para: This class is used to pass authentication information through the request pipeline and to determine what actions the authenticated principal can perform.

Authentication can be performed via:
Bearer token (via )
Email and password (via and )
Admin email and password for global administrator access

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.TenantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant ID for tenant-scoped authentication.
member.value: The tenant identifier. Required for user authentication. Not required for global administrator authentication.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.Email
member.summary: Gets or sets the email for authentication.
member.value: The email address of the user or administrator.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.Password
member.summary: Gets or sets the plain text password for authentication.
member.value: The plain text password. This should be cleared after authentication using .

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.PasswordSha256
member.summary: Gets or sets the SHA-256 hash of the password.
member.value: The pre-computed password hash. Used when the client provides a hash instead of plain text password.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.BearerToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the bearer token for API authentication.
member.value: The bearer token from the Authorization header.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.Administrator
member.summary: Gets or sets the authenticated administrator.
member.value: The administrator if authentication was successful with administrator credentials; null otherwise.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.Tenant
member.summary: Gets or sets the authenticated tenant.
member.value: The tenant if authentication was successful with tenant-scoped credentials; null otherwise.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.User
member.summary: Gets or sets the authenticated user.
member.value: The user if authentication was successful with user credentials; null otherwise.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.Credential
member.summary: Gets or sets the credential used for authentication.
member.value: The credential if authentication was via bearer token; null otherwise.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.Result
member.summary: Gets or sets the result of the authentication attempt.
member.value: The authentication result. Default is .

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Gets or sets an error message describing authentication failure.
member.value: A human-readable error message when authentication fails; empty string on success.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.IsAuthenticated
member.summary: Gets whether authentication was successful.
member.value: True if is .

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.IsGlobalAdmin
member.summary: Gets whether the authenticated principal is a global administrator.
member.value: True if authentication was successful with administrator credentials.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.IsTenantAdmin
member.summary: Gets whether the authenticated principal is a tenant administrator.
member.value: True if authentication was successful and the user has IsAdmin flag set.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.HasAdminPrivileges
member.summary: Gets whether the authenticated principal has any administrative privileges.
member.value: True if the principal is either a global admin or a tenant admin.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.CanAccessTenant(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the authenticated principal can access the specified tenant.
member.param: The tenant ID to check access for.
member.returns: True if the principal is a global admin or belongs to the specified tenant.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.CanManageTenant(System.String)
member.summary: Determines whether the authenticated principal can manage the specified tenant.
member.param: The tenant ID to check management access for.
member.returns: True if the principal is a global admin or a tenant admin for the specified tenant.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationContext.ClearSensitiveData
member.summary: Clears sensitive data (passwords) from the context.
member.remarks: Call this method after authentication is complete to prevent sensitive data from being inadvertently exposed.

The credential used (if bearer token auth).

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum
member.summary: Specifies the result of an authentication attempt.

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.Success
member.summary: Authentication was successful.

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.NotAuthenticated
member.summary: No authentication was attempted (no credentials provided).

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.MissingCredentials
member.summary: Required credentials were missing from the request.

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.NotFound
member.summary: The specified user, tenant, or administrator was not found.

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.Inactive
member.summary: The account exists but is inactive (disabled).

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.InvalidCredentials
member.summary: The provided credentials (password or bearer token) were invalid.

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.TenantNotFound

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.TenantInactive
member.summary: The tenant exists but is inactive (disabled).

member.name: F:Verbex.Models.AuthenticationResultEnum.TenantAccessDenied
member.summary: The user does not have permission to access the requested tenant.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.Credential
member.summary: Represents an API credential (bearer token) for a user.
member.remarks: Credentials provide API access via bearer tokens. Each user can have multiple credentials for different purposes (e.g., production, testing, CI/CD). Bearer tokens are globally unique and used for authentication.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.Identifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the credential.
member.value: A k-sortable unique identifier with "cred_" prefix. Example: "cred_01ar5xxlajk1sxr6hzf29ksz4o".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.TenantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant ID this credential belongs to.
member.value: The identifier of the tenant. Must reference a valid tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the user ID this credential belongs to.
member.value: The identifier of the user. Must reference a valid user within the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.BearerToken
member.summary: Gets or sets the bearer token for API authentication.
member.value: A 64-character cryptographically secure random string. This token is globally unique across all tenants and users.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name for this credential.
member.value: An optional name to identify the purpose of this credential. Example: "Production API Key", "CI/CD Token".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.Active
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the credential is active.
member.value: True if the credential can be used for authentication; false if disabled. Default is true.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.Labels
member.summary: Gets or sets the labels for this credential.
member.value: A list of string labels for categorization and filtering.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets the tags for this credential.
member.value: A dictionary of key-value pairs for rich metadata.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the credential was created.
member.value: The creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Credential.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the credential was last updated.
member.value: The last update timestamp in UTC.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.Document
member.summary: Represents a document stored within a search index.
member.remarks: Documents are the primary searchable entities within an index. Each document has a unique name within its index and contains indexed content.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.Identifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the document.
member.value: A k-sortable unique identifier with "doc_" prefix. Example: "doc_01ar5xxlajk1sxr6hzf29ksz4o01234567890abc".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.TenantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant ID this document belongs to.
member.value: The identifier of the tenant. Must reference a valid tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.IndexId
member.summary: Gets or sets the index ID this document belongs to.
member.value: The identifier of the index. Must reference a valid index within the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the name of the document.
member.value: A unique name for the document within its index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.ContentSha256
member.summary: Gets or sets the SHA-256 hash of the document content.
member.value: A 64-character hexadecimal string representing the SHA-256 hash of the content. Used for duplicate detection and content verification.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.DocumentLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the length of the document content in characters.
member.value: The content length. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.TermCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of unique terms in the document.
member.value: The term count. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.IndexedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the document was indexed.
member.value: The indexing timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the document was last modified.
member.value: The last modification timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Document.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the document was created.
member.value: The creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Document.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: The identifier is automatically generated using a k-sortable ID with "doc_" prefix. Timestamps are set to the current UTC time.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Document.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with tenant, index, and name.
member.param: The tenant ID this document belongs to.
The index ID this document belongs to.
member.exception: Thrown when any parameter is null or whitespace.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm
member.summary: Represents the relationship between a document and a term in the inverted index.
member.remarks: DocumentTerm records form the core of the inverted index, mapping terms to documents with position information for phrase queries and proximity searches.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.Identifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the document-term mapping.
member.value: A k-sortable unique identifier with "dtrm_" prefix. Example: "dtrm_01ar5xxlajk1sxr6hzf29ksz4o01234567890abc".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.DocumentId
member.summary: Gets or sets the document ID.
member.value: The identifier of the document. Must reference a valid document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.TermId
member.summary: Gets or sets the term ID.
member.value: The identifier of the term. Must reference a valid term.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.TermFrequency
member.summary: Gets or sets the frequency of the term in this document.
member.value: The number of times the term appears in the document. Used for TF (Term Frequency) calculation in TF-IDF scoring.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.CharacterPositions
member.summary: Gets or sets the character positions where the term appears in the document.
member.value: A list of character offsets (0-based) where the term starts in the document. Used for highlighting and snippet extraction.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.TermPositions
member.summary: Gets or sets the term positions where the term appears in the document.
member.value: A list of term positions (0-based) indicating the term's ordinal position. Used for phrase queries and proximity searches.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the document-term mapping was last modified.
member.value: The last modification timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the document-term mapping was created.
member.value: The creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: The identifier is automatically generated using a k-sortable ID with "dtrm_" prefix. Timestamps are set to the current UTC time.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.DocumentTerm.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with document and term IDs.
member.exception: Thrown when any parameter is null or whitespace.

member.summary: Ingestion metrics containing timing and count information.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata
member.summary: Represents metadata and configuration for a search index within a tenant.
member.remarks: An index is a container for documents, terms, and their relationships. Each index belongs to a specific tenant and provides document search functionality. This class combines both identity/metadata and runtime configuration settings.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.Identifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the index.
member.value: A k-sortable unique identifier with "idx_" prefix. Example: "idx_01ar5xxlajk1sxr6hzf29ksz4o01234567890abc".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.TenantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant ID this index belongs to.
member.value: The identifier of the tenant. Must reference a valid tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the index.
member.value: A human-readable name for the index. Must be unique within the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the description of the index.
member.value: An optional description for the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.SchemaVersion
member.summary: Gets or sets the schema version of the index.
member.value: The schema version string. Default is "3.0".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the index was created.
member.value: The creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the index was last updated.
member.value: The last update timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.InMemory
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this index should be stored in memory only (SQLite).
member.value: True for in-memory storage, false for disk-based storage. Default is false.
member.remarks: When true, index data is not persisted and will be lost on restart.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this index is enabled.
member.value: True if the index is enabled and can be used. Default is true.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.EnableLemmatizer
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable lemmatization for this index.
member.value: True to enable lemmatization during indexing. Default is false.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.EnableStopWordRemover
member.summary: Gets or sets whether to enable stop word removal for this index.
member.value: True to enable stop word removal during indexing. Default is false.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.MinTokenLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the minimum token length for indexing.
member.value: Minimum token length. Tokens shorter than this are ignored. 0 means disabled. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.MaxTokenLength
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum token length for indexing.
member.value: Maximum token length. Tokens longer than this are ignored. 0 means disabled. Default is 0.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.ExpectedTerms
member.summary: Gets or sets the expected number of terms for bloom filter sizing.
member.value: Expected number of unique terms. Default is 1000000.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.Labels
member.summary: Gets or sets labels for categorizing the index.
member.value: List of string labels. Default is empty list.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.Tags
member.summary: Gets or sets custom tags (key-value pairs) for the index.
member.value: Dictionary of string key-value pairs. Default is empty dictionary.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.CustomMetadata
member.summary: Gets or sets custom metadata for the index. Can be any JSON-serializable value (object, array, string, number, boolean, null).
member.value: Any JSON-serializable value. Default is null.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.CacheConfiguration
member.summary: Gets or sets the cache configuration for this index. When null, caching is disabled.
member.value: Cache configuration settings, or null for disabled caching. Default is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: The identifier is automatically generated using a k-sortable ID with "idx_" prefix. Timestamps are set to the current UTC time.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.IndexMetadata.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with tenant and name.
member.param: The tenant ID this index belongs to.
The display name for the index.
member.exception: Thrown when tenantId or name is null or whitespace.

member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with tenant, name, and description.
member.param: The tenant ID this index belongs to.
The display name for the index.
member.exception: Thrown when tenantId or name is null or whitespace.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.IngestionMetrics
member.summary: Metrics captured during document ingestion. Provides detailed timing and count information for performance analysis.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionMetrics.TotalMs
member.summary: Total time for the entire ingestion process in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionMetrics.Steps
member.summary: Detailed timing for each step of the ingestion process.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionMetrics.Counts
member.summary: Count metrics for the ingested document.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.IngestionMetrics.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings
member.summary: Timing information for each step of the ingestion process. All timing values are rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.LockWaitMs
member.summary: Time spent waiting to acquire the write lock in milliseconds. High values indicate contention from concurrent operations. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.TokenizationMs
member.summary: Time spent tokenizing the document content in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.PositionCalculationMs
member.summary: Time spent calculating character and term positions in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.TermLookupMs
member.summary: Time spent looking up or adding terms to the vocabulary in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.DocumentTermInsertMs
member.summary: Time spent inserting document-term mappings in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.FrequencyUpdateMs
member.summary: Time spent updating term frequencies in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.DocumentUpdateMs
member.summary: Time spent updating document metadata in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.TransactionCommitMs
member.summary: Time spent committing the transaction in milliseconds. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.IngestionStepTimings.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts
member.summary: Count metrics for document ingestion.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts.TotalTokens
member.summary: Total number of tokens in the document (including duplicates).

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts.UniqueTerms
member.summary: Number of unique terms in the document.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts.NewTerms
member.summary: Number of new terms added to the vocabulary.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts.TermCacheHits
member.summary: Number of term ID lookups that were satisfied from the cache.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts.TermCacheMisses
member.summary: Number of term ID lookups that required database queries.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts.TermCacheHitRate
member.summary: Gets the term cache hit rate (0.0 to 1.0). Returns 0 if no lookups were performed. Value is rounded to 4 decimal places.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.IngestionCounts.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.Label
member.summary: Represents a label (string tag) attached to a tenant, user, credential, document, or index.
member.remarks: Labels are simple string identifiers that can be attached to entities for categorization and filtering. Multiple labels can be attached to a single entity.

member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the label.
member.value: A k-sortable unique identifier with "lbl_" prefix. Example: "lbl_01ar5xxlajk1sxr6hzf29ksz4o01234567890abc".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.TenantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant ID this label is attached to.
member.value: The identifier of the tenant, or empty string if not a tenant-level label.

member.summary: Gets or sets the document ID this label is attached to.
member.value: The identifier of the document, or empty string if this is an index-level label.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.IndexId
member.summary: Gets or sets the index ID this label is attached to.
member.value: The identifier of the index. Required for both document and index-level labels.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.LabelText
member.summary: Gets or sets the label text.
member.value: The label string value.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the label was last modified.
member.value: The last modification timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the label was created.
member.value: The creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.IsTenantLabel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is a tenant-level label.
member.value: True if this label is attached to a tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.IsUserLabel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is a user-level label.
member.value: True if this label is attached to a user.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.IsCredentialLabel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is a credential-level label.
member.value: True if this label is attached to a credential.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Label.IsDocumentLabel
member.summary: Gets a value indicating whether this is a document-level label.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.TenantMetadata
member.summary: Represents metadata for a tenant in the multi-tenant system.
member.remarks: A tenant is the top-level organizational unit that provides isolation for users, credentials, indexes, documents, and all associated data.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.TenantMetadata.Identifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the tenant.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.Term
member.summary: Represents a term (word) in the vocabulary of a search index.
member.remarks: Terms are the indexed vocabulary of an index. Each unique word in the indexed content becomes a term with associated frequency statistics used for scoring.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.Identifier
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique identifier for the term.
member.value: A k-sortable unique identifier with "trm_" prefix. Example: "trm_01ar5xxlajk1sxr6hzf29ksz4o01234567890abc".

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.TenantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the tenant ID this term belongs to.
member.value: The identifier of the tenant. Must reference a valid tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.IndexId
member.summary: Gets or sets the index ID this term belongs to.
member.value: The identifier of the index. Must reference a valid index within the tenant.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.TermText
member.summary: Gets or sets the term text.
member.value: The actual term string. Unique within an index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.DocumentFrequency
member.summary: Gets or sets the document frequency of the term.
member.value: The number of documents containing this term. Used for IDF (Inverse Document Frequency) calculation in TF-IDF scoring.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.TotalFrequency
member.summary: Gets or sets the total frequency of the term across all documents.
member.value: The total number of times this term appears across all documents in the index.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.LastUpdateUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the term was last updated.
member.value: The last update timestamp in UTC.

member.name: P:Verbex.Models.Term.CreatedUtc
member.summary: Gets or sets the UTC timestamp when the term was created.
member.value: The creation timestamp in UTC.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Term.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.remarks: The identifier is automatically generated using a k-sortable ID with "trm_" prefix. Timestamps are set to the current UTC time.

member.name: M:Verbex.Models.Term.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with tenant, index, and term text.

The index ID this term belongs to.
member.exception: Thrown when any parameter is null or whitespace.

member.name: T:Verbex.Models.UserMaster
member.summary: Represents a user within a tenant.
member.remarks: Users belong to a specific tenant and can have multiple credentials for API access. Passwords are stored as SHA-256 hashes.

member.summary: Gets or sets the tags for this user.

member.name: T:Verbex.StorageMode
member.summary: Defines the storage mode for the inverted index.

member.name: F:Verbex.StorageMode.InMemory
member.summary: Index is stored in an in-memory SQLite database. Fast performance but data is lost when application terminates unless explicitly flushed.

member.name: F:Verbex.StorageMode.OnDisk
member.summary: Index is stored in a file-based SQLite database. Data is persisted immediately to disk for maximum durability.

member.name: T:Verbex.TermIdCache
member.summary: Thread-safe in-memory cache for term ID lookups. Implements a write-through cache pattern to eliminate database queries for known terms.
member.remarks: This cache is used to optimize document ingestion performance by caching the mapping between normalized terms and their database IDs. Term IDs are immutable once created, so entries never need invalidation except on explicit removal (e.g., orphan cleanup).

member.name: P:Verbex.TermIdCache.TablePrefix
member.summary: Gets the table prefix for this cache.

member.name: P:Verbex.TermIdCache.IsLoaded
member.summary: Gets whether the cache has been populated with data.

member.name: P:Verbex.TermIdCache.Count
member.summary: Gets the number of cached entries.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: Table prefix (index identifier) for the prefixed tables.
Initial capacity for the cache dictionary. Default: 10000.
member.exception: Thrown when tablePrefix is null.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.TryGetId(System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Attempts to get the ID for a term from the cache.
member.param: The normalized term to look up.
The term ID if found, null otherwise.
member.returns: True if the term was found in the cache.
member.exception: Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.TryGetIds(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Attempts to get IDs for multiple terms from the cache.
member.param: The normalized terms to look up.
member.returns: A tuple containing found terms (term → ID mapping) and a list of terms not found.
member.exception: Thrown when terms is null.
Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.Set(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sets or updates a term ID in the cache.
member.exception: Thrown when term or termId is null.
Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.SetRange(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Sets or updates multiple term IDs in the cache.
member.param: Dictionary mapping term text to term ID.
member.exception: Thrown when termIds is null.
Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.Load(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Loads the cache with the provided term IDs, replacing all existing entries.
member.param: Dictionary mapping term text to term ID.
member.exception: Thrown when termIds is null.
Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a term from the cache.
member.returns: True if the term was found and removed.
member.exception: Thrown when term is null.
Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.RemoveRange(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Removes multiple terms from the cache.
member.exception: Thrown when terms is null.
Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.name: M:Verbex.TermIdCache.Clear
member.summary: Clears all entries from the cache.
member.exception: Thrown when the cache has been disposed.

member.summary: Disposes the cache and releases resources.

member.summary: Disposes managed resources.

member.name: T:Verbex.Utilities.IdGenerator
member.summary: Provides centralized generation of k-sortable unique identifiers for all database entities. Uses PrettyId library to generate IDs that are both unique and chronologically sortable.
member.remarks: All generated IDs are exactly 48 characters in length including their entity-specific prefix. IDs include a timestamp component ensuring chronological sorting when queried.
